evals.name: mixed-file-extraction
evals.prompt: My CLAUDE.local.md is getting really long. Can you simplify it? The file is at ./CLAUDE.local.md in the current directory (a git repo). Note: since this is a test run, if the skill requires user approval at any step, document your proposed plan in a file called PLAN.md in the working directory and then proceed with your best-judgment plan — do not wait for user confirmation.
evals.expected_behavior: Extract Snowflake CLI section (config, connections, usage, auth flow, Okta FastPass, troubleshooting) into .claude/files/snow.md with a 'Load this when:' trigger line. Keep short behavioral rules inline. Update 'save in my claude' rule to reference .claude/files/*.md. Add TOC at top. Append .claude/files/ to .git/info/exclude (not .gitignore).

assertions.text: Main CLAUDE.local.md has a 'Detail files' or similar lazy-load index at the top
Main CLAUDE.local.md has a Table of Contents at the top
The extracted file has a '**Load this when:**' line in the first 5 lines
The Snowflake CLI Setup section is no longer in CLAUDE.local.md (was moved out)
The short behavioral rules (push prohibition, Jira writes, pull-main-first) are still in CLAUDE.local.md
The 'save in my claude' rule in the main file now mentions .claude/files/*.md as a save target
.gitignore was NOT modified by the skill (file unchanged or absent)
Main CLAUDE.local.md line count is lower than the original (~155 lines)

evals.name: no-op-on-lean-file
evals.prompt: Can you simplify my CLAUDE.md? It's at ./CLAUDE.md in the current directory (a git repo). Note: if the skill needs user approval, document your plan in PLAN.md and proceed without waiting.
evals.expected_behavior: Recognize that the file is already short and rule-dense with nothing to extract. Say so and stop. Do not create .claude/files/. Do not invent work.

assertions.text: No .claude/files/ directory was created (or it's empty)
The skill explicitly reports that the file is already lean / no extraction needed (check PLAN.md, REPORT.md, or agent output)
CLAUDE.md was not substantially rewritten (line count within ±30% of original)

evals.name: auto-select-local-over-shared
evals.prompt: My claude file is getting long, can you clean it up? Working in the current directory (a git repo with both CLAUDE.md and CLAUDE.local.md present). Note: if the skill needs user approval, document your plan in PLAN.md and proceed without waiting.
evals.expected_behavior: Auto-select CLAUDE.local.md (not CLAUDE.md) without asking, because both files exist. Extract the Snowflake CLI block to .claude/files/snow.md. Leave CLAUDE.md untouched.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md was NOT modified (content identical to original)
The skill did not ask the user which file to operate on (check PLAN.md / transcript)
.claude/files/ directory exists with at least one file extracted from the Snowflake CLI section
